title: armeria hispalensis
intro: Armeria hispalensis, also known as the Hispalensis Thrift or Rockrose, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Armeria hispalensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat skin irritations.
